packs.name: Aerial Car Control
packs.description: Basic air roll and pitch control. Start with simple lifts and landings.
packs.creator: Wayton

packs.name: Rings 3 (Normal)
packs.description: Navigate rings while maintaining momentum. Great for air roll practice.
packs.creator: DMC

packs.name: Ground Shots Consistency
packs.description: Repetitive ground shots to build muscle memory and accuracy.
packs.creator: Poquito

packs.name: Defense & Redirects
packs.description: Defensive clears followed by redirect opportunities. Requires fast reads.
packs.creator: Thanovic

packs.name: Flip Reset Mastery
packs.description: Advanced flip reset setups from various angles and surfaces.
packs.creator: JSTN

packs.name: Rebound Recovery
packs.description: Practice reading rebounds off the backboard and converting them into goals.
packs.creator: SunlessKhan
